reasoning: Your current limiter is the lactate clearance issue due to a 9.3% decline in power from 5-min to 20-min efforts. The last ride showed a strong aerobic base but lacked intensity specific to the Alpine Loop demands. This session targets improved lactate processing crucial for the 8.5-mile climb at Emigration Canyon, simulating the rigors of the key segment in the target event.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 12-minute over-unders: 3 minutes at 242-256W (102-108%), followed by 3 minutes at 201-218W (85-92%) to simulate climbing at varying intensities.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
